query: SELECT id, customer_name, customer_email, status, scheduled_date, experience_id, channel, created_at FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Simo%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Blanquez%' OR customer_email LIKE '%severalenergy%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
